title: Kuro's Economy
description: A highly configurable, realistic and easy-to-use economy system, written with performance and scalability in mind!
body:
# Howdy!

This mod adds a broad economy system to your game. It includes an ATM, bank notes, shops and much more! You can look through the gallery to see some of the content.

I moved the documentation to a separate wiki site. If you want to look up how to use this mod or see general information about the content, please visit the [docs](https://kurodocs.gitbook.io/kuros-mod-docs).

## Future Updates!

My plan is to keep this mod updated if there are enough people that request features or maintenance. Please note that I will not provide updates for old versions (1.20.1 as of now).

Enjoy!

## Known incompatibilities

The following mods are (probably) incompatible:

*   [Mo' Enchantments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-enchantments)

## Q/A

**Q: Is this mod safe for shaders and big modpacks? Can I use it for my server/modpack?**  
**A:** Yes and yes. I tried it in different modpacks with 150 - 250 mods. Also, a credit is appreciated but not needed.

**Q: Backport to version XY?**  
**A:** No.

**Q: Modloader XY?**  
**A:** I only support NeoForge, so no.

**Q: Do you accept requests for items and features?**  
**A:** Sure! You can always submit feature requests and ideas.
